data.body: AC amendment: Replace the 'assert at least one story-level dep was promoted via build_dep_graph()' criterion with a direct LINK event location check. After calling add_dependency(task-a, task-b, depends_on): (a) verify NO LINK event file exists in task-00-00-00 directory (no task-level link written), AND (b) verify a LINK event file exists in story-00-00 directory pointing to story-01-00. This will be RED before 983e-7fff is implemented. Do NOT use build_dep_graph() for the promotion assertion in SC13.
